runTitle: Cloud Run Production Direct API - v8.12.103 P28/P29 deterministic evidence validation
coveredSurfaces: GitLab release pipeline v8.12.103 success: deploy, deploy_ai_engine, post_deploy_smoke, post_deploy_ai_engine_smoke
P28: CPU 경고 서버들의 평균 디스크 => CPU >= 80% 조건 2대 필터 후 평균 디스크 반환, deterministic monitoring-metric-current, totalTokens=0
P29: 디스크 기준 상위3+하위3 => 디스크 상위 3대와 하위 3대를 모두 반환, deterministic monitoring-metric-ranking, totalTokens=0
skippedSurfaces: Playwright UI screenshot rerun skipped: defect and fix are deterministic AI Engine evidence-layer behavior, direct production API validation covers the changed route

aiLatencyObservations.surface: P28 CPU warning filter then disk average

expertAssessments.rationale: P28/P29 신규 약점은 v8.12.103 production direct API에서 deterministic evidence 경로로 재검증되어 PASS. 잔여 Q-NEW100 peak metric group filter는 기존 P3 non-blocking polish로 유지.

completedImprovements.evidence: v8.12.103 production direct API: 'CPU 경고 서버들의 평균 디스크는?' returns CPU >= 80% condition subset and average disk, not CPU-only current metric

completedImprovements.title: P29: metric-ranking 경로 TOP+BOTTOM 동시 질의 미처리
completedImprovements.evidence: v8.12.103 production direct API: '디스크 기준 상위3+하위3 서버 알려줘' returns both 디스크 상위 3대 and 디스크 하위 3대 in one deterministic answer

notes: Local verification before release: AI Engine targeted test current-metrics-evidence-provider 100 passed; AI Engine type-check passed; AI Engine full test suite 1651 passed; root test:contract 24 passed; root type-check/lint/test:quick passed; git diff --check passed.
Production direct API validation used Cloud Run supervisor endpoint with API key from local env; secret values were not recorded.
P28/P29 responses used deterministic providers and reported totalTokens=0, so the fix does not add LLM cost or Cloud Run spec usage.
Node fetch had one transient DNS EAI_AGAIN against the Cloud Run hostname; curl retry and subsequent direct API calls succeeded.
